MASTER CALENDAR COURT

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, Clerks C. Amador/K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Neveo Mosser is present.
Michael S. Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Christopher Gray is present.
Laura Chiera representing the defendant through limited scope.
(On 8/1/07, default was entered against defendant Joyce Weaver).

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of August 27, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. remains as set.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF, TEL. NO. 863-7100, APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING- THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER GRAY and JOYCE WEAVER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is denied. Five days to respond to complaint. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)
